name: Rigetti Computing, Inc.
business: Rigetti builds and operates quantum computers based on superconducting qubits, and sells quantum processing units (QPUs), cloud-based quantum computing as a service (QCaaS), and development contracts. Its customers include U.S. government agencies, commercial enterprises, and academic institutions. Revenue is primarily from development contracts and QPU sales.
namedCustomers: India's Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC)

exposures.sentence: We build and operate quantum computers.
Our partners and customers include ... U.S. government organizations such as Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA), Department of Energy (DOE), and Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL).

catalysts.event: Delivery of two Novera QPU systems expected in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: Delivery for both systems is expected in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Deployment of a 108-qubit quantum computer to C-DAC expected in the second half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: The system will be installed on-premises at C-DAC's Bengaluru center and is expected to be deployed in the second half of 2026.
